aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
   - **User:** pemikalsen-sudo
   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)
   - **Status:** Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **TS0003 (_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp)**
   - **Drivers:** `switch_3gang`
   - **Issue:** [Bug Report](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)
   - **Status:** Open

2. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
   - **Drivers:** `radiator_valve`
   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)
   - **Status:** Open

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the latest activity.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #45** - Update driver.compose.json
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Repo:** [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)
   - **Status:** Merged

2. **PR #46** - Adding support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Repo:** [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged

3. **PR #1166** - Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
   - **User:** chernals
   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged

4. **PR #1350** - Added TS110E driver
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **User:** PiTRiS87
   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)
   - **Status:** Open

5. **PR #1253** - Added 3 new devices
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`

   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)
   - **Status:** Open

6. **PR #1219** - Update driver.compose.json

   - **Repo:** [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

7. **PR #1218** - Update driver.compose.json

8. **PR #1195** - Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing support, and notable pull requests. Further contributions and discussions are encouraged to enhance device compatibility and functionality.
